issue_title: Drag-and-drop failure for rich text cells seem to duplicate their content on the UI
issue_body_preview:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/731691c6-3dce-4143-9da4-5a0e6c874ef2)

If a rich text cell fails to drop*, it will sometimes duplicate its content. This appears to be a UI bug, since the component will return to its correct content after a successful drag-and-drop.

* the issue w
test_description_zh: 在页面中创建包含内容的富文本单元格，尝试对其进行拖拽排序操作。在拖拽过程中模拟拖放失败的场景（如将单元格拖到无效的放置区域后释放），观察该富文本单元格的显示内容是否正常。
expected_result_zh: 当富文本单元格拖放失败后，该单元格应恢复到原来的位置，且其内容保持不变，不应出现内容重复/复制的现象。
